creator: trueos@norwegianrockcat.com
text:
Created attachment 208638
Patch for devel/ros-rosdistro

Update ros-rosdistro to 0.7.5

There is not a set of release notes, but the changes are listed here:

https://github.com/ros-infrastructure/rosdistro/commits/0.7.5

The big change seems to be to allow better use of different python versions (something that ROS must do due to EOL on Python 2.7).
